headline.zh-CN: 新建专辑必须选择社团
headline.en: Requires a circle when creating albums

summary.zh-CN: 新专辑创建流程现在要求先选择一个可访问社团；已有未关联社团的旧专辑仍可继续查看和管理。
summary.en: New album creation now requires selecting an accessible circle, while existing legacy albums without a circle remain viewable and manageable.

title.zh-CN: 新专辑不再支持空社团创建
title.en: New albums can no longer be created without a circle

description.zh-CN: 创建页会要求选择社团；没有可用社团时，会引导用户先创建社团或使用邀请码加入社团。
description.en: The creation page now requires a circle selection, and users with no available circles are guided to create a circle or join one with an invite code.
